step_by_step_thinking: The key information here pertains to various neonatal reflexes present at birth. Among the listed reflexes - Landau, Babinski, startle, and Moro’s - only the Landau reflex does not typically manifest immediately after birth but develops later around infancy.
raw_response:
The key information here pertains to various neonatal reflexes present at birth. Among the listed reflexes - Landau, Babinski, startle, and Moro’s - only the Landau reflex does not typically manifest immediately after birth but develops later around infancy.
